description: Summarize an AnnData / single-cell file: shape, obs/var columns, layers, obsm/varm/uns keys, X dtype + value range, raw-vs-normalized guess, and which pipeline steps (PCA/neighbors/UMAP/clustering) are already present.
rules: read-only: never writes back to the input; only emits a summary report
dispatches on file extension / 10x mtx directory layout via the vendored _common.load_anndata
usage: Set INPUT (any .h5ad/.h5/.csv/.loom/.mtx file or 10x mtx dir). Output: inspect.txt.
limitation: Read-only inspection. Requires scanpy installed to read the data; if scanpy is absent the porter still writes inspect.txt (placeholder) and exits 0.
